_note: Built from mattfryed.com + kyleacalian.com/home/fernet-halloween-2024 (Kyle Calian, creative producer — permission granted). Project = Fernet Branca's 'Eyeknow Manor of Spirits & Astonishments', Halloween 2024, New Orleans. Copy/credits are from those sources; images referenced by URL from the Squarespace CDNs (tarot art on Matt's CDN, event/build photo slots are designed placeholders (Kyle links removed)). Node geometry + colours match the live roster (P-01). Tarot deck illustrated by Diego Patiño. Sample-grade pending Matt's review.
name: EYEKNOW MANOR

hero.alt: The Eyeknow Manor of Spirits & Astonishments, lit at night

intro.title: CLASSIFICATION
intro.body:
The Eyeknow Manor of Spirits & Astonishments — a haunted mansion in New Orleans, a block from Bourbon Street, built for Fernet Branca to own Halloween.

A multi-room, sensory experience combining cutting-edge technology, Hollywood-style decor, and a self-guided scavenger hunt for those daring enough to explore its halls. Around it: a run of online video spots and a Halloween-themed merchandise line.

nodes.label: Experiential Design
nodes.blurb: The Manor as one immersive instrument — many rooms, one scavenger hunt.

blocks.title: THE MANOR
blocks.body:
Guests moved through the mansion at their own pace, solving a self-guided scavenger hunt that threaded the rooms together — bar, portrait halls, fortune teller, the vintage-TV array, the courtyard, each a station in the hunt.

Cutting-edge technology met Hollywood-style decor a block from Bourbon Street in New Orleans, built for Fernet Branca to own the season.

blocks.caption: The Manor from the street — a block from Bourbon Street.
Courtyard — speakeasy bar, mapped TVs, projector, DJ booth.

nodes.label: Integrated Facial Recognition AI system
nodes.blurb: AI that reads the room and drives the portraits and prizes.

blocks.title: AI SYSTEM
blocks.body: An AI layer wired into the experience — generating portraits and driving the Manor's reactive set-pieces.

nodes.label: Installation design
nodes.blurb: The physical build — the mansion, courtyard, sign, and the self-moving Ouija board.

blocks.title: THE OUIJA BOARD
blocks.alt: Ouija board, custom-coded to move on its own and give scavenger-hunt clues

nodes.label: Living portraits
nodes.blurb: Two AI-generated portrait walls — and a roulette of prizes.

blocks.title: AI PORTRAIT WALLS
blocks.caption: One of two AI-generated portrait walls + the prize roulette.

blocks.body: One of two AI-generated portrait walls, paired with our take on roulette and its unique prizes.

nodes.label: Pepper's Ghost Fortune Teller
nodes.blurb: A 19th-century illusion driving an AI tarot reader.

blocks.title: FORTUNE TELLER
blocks.body: A Pepper's Ghost AI tarot reader — the classic floating-spectre illusion driving a generative reading, dealt from a deck illustrated by Diego Patiño.

nodes.label: Interior Design
nodes.blurb: Speakeasy bar, merch room, and the rooms in between.

blocks.alt: Edoardo Branca pouring shots at the Manor bar

nodes.label: Event visual system
nodes.blurb: The live visual language across the Manor and courtyard.

nodes.label: Sound Design
nodes.blurb: Score, spatial audio, and the courtyard DJ.

nodes.label: Environmental Signage
nodes.blurb: Custom woodcut signage for the Manor.

blocks.title: WOODCUT SIGN
blocks.caption: Custom woodcut sign for the Manor.

nodes.label: Custom Tarot Card Deck
nodes.blurb: A full custom major arcana — illustrated by Diego Patiño.

blocks.title: THE DECK
blocks.body: A custom-illustrated major arcana — twenty-two cards plus a back design — dealt by the fortune teller. Illustrated by Diego Patiño.

nodes.label: Social & Digital Extensions
nodes.blurb: OLVs and a Halloween merch line around the Manor.

blocks.title: CAMPAIGN
blocks.body: Several online video spots and a Halloween-themed merchandise line extended the Manor beyond New Orleans, owning the season for the brand.

nodes.label: CRT Array Streaming Display
nodes.blurb: A wall of vintage TVs, mapped and switchable, live-streamed from a phone.

blocks.title: VINTAGE TV ARRAY
blocks.caption: Mapped to several programs — isolated and connected — switching to a phone-streamed live cam.

blocks.body: A unique vintage-TV array mapped to several programs, both isolated and connected — switching between dispersed content and a phone-streamed live cam.
